name: Miu Shinoda
description: A placid and soft-spoken actress who shares a boarding house with Blast and Yuri. She is 27, but her acting profile states that she is 23. Her name is often mispronounced "Myuu" by many people. Miu wears long sleeves to hide the scars on her wrists from self-mutilation. Also, in volume 11 (the volume where she first appears), it's shown that she's a very good mahjong player (she claimed that she learned her skills by having special training for her role in a mahjong movie as a nameless rival).   ~!She is currently dating Yasu.!~  (Source: Wikipedia)
